integrations.name: LiteLLM
integrations.description: Add long-term memory to any LLM via LiteLLM proxy callbacks. Zero code changes — configure once and every model gets memory.

integrations.name: CrewAI
integrations.description: Give CrewAI agents persistent, cross-session memory. Facts learned in one run are available in every future run.

integrations.name: Pydantic AI
integrations.description: Integrate Hindsight memory into Pydantic AI agents with a simple dependency injection pattern.

integrations.name: Vercel AI SDK
integrations.description: Add persistent memory to Vercel AI SDK applications. Works with any model provider supported by the AI SDK.

integrations.name: Vercel Chat
integrations.description: Drop-in memory layer for the Vercel AI Chatbot. Remembers users across sessions out of the box.

integrations.name: Agno
integrations.description: Plug Hindsight into Agno agents for structured, long-term memory storage and retrieval.

integrations.name: Hermes
integrations.description: Use Hindsight as the memory backend for the Hermes multi-agent messaging framework.

integrations.name: MCP Server
integrations.description: Expose Hindsight memory as a Model Context Protocol server. Compatible with Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client.

integrations.name: ChatGPT
integrations.description: Add persistent long-term memory to ChatGPT via OAuth-secured MCP connectors. Store insights from conversations and recall relevant context across sessions.

integrations.name: Perplexity
integrations.description: Add persistent long-term memory to Perplexity via OAuth-secured MCP connectors. Store research findings and recall relevant context across searches.

integrations.name: Claude Code
integrations.description: Automatic long-term memory for Claude Code via Hindsight hooks. Captures every conversation, recalls relevant context on every prompt.

integrations.name: Codex
integrations.description: Automatic long-term memory for Codex CLI via Hindsight hooks. Captures every conversation, recalls relevant context on every prompt.

integrations.name: OpenClaw
integrations.description: Integrate Hindsight with OpenClaw to add memory capabilities to Claude-based agent workflows.

integrations.name: Claude Code Skills
integrations.description: Add Hindsight memory to Claude Code agents via the Skills integration. Persistent context across coding sessions.

integrations.name: LangGraph / LangChain
integrations.description: Add persistent memory to LangGraph and LangChain agents. Supports Memory Tools, Graph Nodes, and BaseStore adapter patterns.

integrations.name: LlamaIndex
integrations.description: Add persistent memory to LlamaIndex agents. Supports agent-driven tools (BaseToolSpec) and automatic memory (BaseMemory).

integrations.name: NemoClaw
integrations.description: Persistent memory for NemoClaw sandboxed agents. One-command setup — no code changes required.

integrations.name: Strands Agents
integrations.description: Give Strands agents persistent long-term memory with Hindsight retain, recall, and reflect tools.

integrations.name: AG2
integrations.description: Persistent long-term memory for AG2 agents with retain, recall, and reflect tools across conversations.

integrations.name: AutoGen
integrations.description: Give AutoGen agents persistent long-term memory with Hindsight FunctionTool instances for retain, recall, and reflect.

integrations.name: OpenCode
integrations.description: Persistent long-term memory plugin for OpenCode. Auto-retains conversations, recalls context on session start, and provides retain/recall/reflect tools.

integrations.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
integrations.description: Give OpenAI Agents SDK agents persistent long-term memory with Hindsight FunctionTool instances for retain, recall, and reflect.

integrations.name: Pipecat
integrations.description: Persistent memory for Pipecat voice AI pipelines via a FrameProcessor that recalls context before each turn and retains conversation content after.

integrations.name: Bedrock AgentCore
integrations.description: Persistent memory for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime agents. Memory survives ephemeral Runtime sessions so agents remember users, decisions, and context across reprovisioning.

integrations.name: HindClaw
integrations.description: Production memory infrastructure for AI agents — server-side access control via Hindsight extensions, Terraform provider for users/groups/banks/permissions, and an OpenClaw plugin with auto-managed embed.

integrations.name: ContextForge
integrations.description: Register Hindsight as an MCP backend in ContextForge gateway. Gives every connected AI tool access to long-term memory via a unified MCP hub.
